mapper.sql: id, course_id, parent_id, name, status, is_completed, is_free, content_text, is_live, live_start_time, live_duration, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_chapter WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM edu_chapter WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_chapter WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_chapter WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_chapter (course_id, parent_id, name, status, is_completed, is_free, content_text, is_live, live_start_time, live_duration, sort, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{status}, #{isCompleted}, #{isFree}, #{contentText}, #{isLive}, #{liveStartTime}, #{liveDuration}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_chapter SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, is_completed = #{isCompleted}, is_free = #{isFree}, content_text = #{contentText}, is_live = #{isLive}, live_start_time = #{liveStartTime}, live_duration = #{liveDuration}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_chapter SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_chapter WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_chapter WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
